description: Placeholder WC 2026 group-stage fixtures derived from the placeholder group draw in oracle/sim/groups.py. NOT the official FIFA 2026 schedule. Kickoff times, venues, and host cities are all null. Update with official data when available.
how_to_update: When the official FIFA schedule is available: (1) update each fixture kickoff_at (ISO-8601 UTC), venue, city, host_country; (2) set is_placeholder to false on updated rows; (3) set source to official_fifa_2026; (4) run make ingest-fixtures; (5) run make simulate blend capture-odds export-web build-frontend.
